description: Canonical local configuration for FPI service vertical labels, roadmap status, summaries, and current demo signals.

service_verticals.name: Executive Risk & Governance
service_verticals.summary: Portfolio-level risk posture, exception visibility, and release/governance decisions.

service_verticals.name: Market / Regional Operations
service_verticals.summary: Market-level prioritization, follow-up, and cross-store operating visibility.

service_verticals.name: Field Operations
service_verticals.summary: Local execution ownership for remediation, verification, and closure readiness.

service_verticals.name: Store Leadership
service_verticals.summary: Store-facing awareness of active protection gaps and safe demo remediation tasks.

service_verticals.name: Security Technology
service_verticals.summary: Camera/VMS, access control, recorder, network/security device health, and source freshness.

service_verticals.name: Fire / Life Safety
service_verticals.summary: Fire alarm evidence, inspection/test proof, aging evidence, and verification workflow.

service_verticals.name: Enterprise Security Intelligence
service_verticals.summary: Incident context, risk linkage, trend signals, and enterprise protection intelligence.

service_verticals.name: Evidence & Verification
service_verticals.summary: Evidence attachment, rejection/missing states, verification-required controls, and proof of closure.

service_verticals.name: Compliance / Audit Readiness
service_verticals.summary: Policy evidence, audit trails, exception aging, and readiness reporting.

service_verticals.name: Work Management / Remediation
service_verticals.summary: Draft work actions, owner roles, priority, remediation state, and closure verification.

service_verticals.name: Vendor / Service Provider Coordination
service_verticals.summary: Future adapter lane for vendor dispatch context, service windows, and proof return.

service_verticals.name: Data Integration / Source Freshness
service_verticals.summary: Source recency, adapter mode, local JSON seed health, and future integration status.
